narrative:
Fremont City 1-C (precinct in Sandusky County) has 436 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
